# Miguel Moreira — Clinical Full-Stack Builder

> Medical Laboratory Technologist with 8+ years in high-complexity hospital labs,
> now building and shipping production HealthTech & MedTech software with React,
> Flutter, FastAPI, n8n and AI (Claude API, LangGraph, RAG). Open to work and
> relocating to Germany & the EU. English C1 (IELTS 7.0), German A2 (learning).

- Name: Miguel Moreira Ampuero ("Miguel Moreira")
- Title: Clinical Full-Stack Builder · HealthTech & MedTech Engineer
- Location: Puerto Montt, Chile — relocating to Germany / EU
- Website: https://www.miguelesteban.cl
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/miguel-moreira-ampuero/
- GitHub: https://github.com/estebanampuero
- Email: miguel.moreira.ampuero@gmail.com
- Booking: https://calendly.com/miguel-moreira-ampuero/30min

## The unfair advantage
Miguel is not a developer trying to learn healthcare. He is a clinical domain
expert — a Medical Laboratory Technologist who spent nearly a decade at Hospital
Puerto Montt (a high-complexity public hospital) operating Roche, Sysmex, BD,
Bruker MALDI-TOF and Werfen platforms, processing up to 600 SARS-CoV-2 PCRs/day
at the pandemic peak — who now uses AI to translate frontline clinical workflows
into shipped software. He digitized a paper-based hospital shift-handover and cut
handover time roughly in half.

## Connection to Germany
Miguel coordinated a cancer-genetics study in collaboration with the University of
Heidelberg, recruiting ~100 patients across Chile (Arica to Castro), and completed
a Heidelberg-co-sponsored workshop on biostatistical analysis of genetic variants.

## Education & credentials
- BSc, Medical Laboratory Technology (with Distinction) — Universidad Austral de Chile (2017)
- Postgraduate Diploma, Quality Management & Clinical Lab Accreditation — Universidad de Concepción (2019, 180 hrs)
- MedTech vendor training: BD (Bactec FX, Phoenix M50, MALDI Biotyper), Roche/Sysmex XN-1000, Werfen ACL TOP
- English C1 (IELTS 7.0) · German A2 (learning) · Spanish (native)
- Certified Kettlebell Instructor (Level I & II)

## Tech stack
- Frontend & mobile: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Flutter, Tailwind CSS
- Backend & data: FastAPI, NestJS, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Firebase, Supabase
- AI & automation: Anthropic Claude API, OpenAI, LangGraph, RAG (pgvector), faster-whisper, n8n
- MedTech platforms: Roche, Sysmex, BD, Bruker MALDI-TOF, Werfen ACL TOP

## Selected projects
- Hospital CAE — clinical scheduling & analytics tool, in production at Hospital Puerto Montt (Next.js/TypeScript). https://github.com/estebanampuero/cae-2.0
- bio-stock-lims — Laboratory Information Management System modeling clinical-lab workflows. https://github.com/estebanampuero/bio-stock-lims
- urgencias-er — Emergency Department shift-handover with voice STT (faster-whisper), Chilean ESI triage, LLM summarization and RBAC (Python/Flask). https://github.com/estebanampuero/urgencias-er
- Personal Health Agent — multimodal AI monorepo (Garmin + medical PDFs + voice) on FastAPI + LangGraph + Claude + Timescale + pgvector + Next.js. https://github.com/estebanampuero/personal-health
- Yoinn — mobile loyalty/wallet app shipped to the Apple App Store and Google Play (Flutter + Firebase), ~200 users at soft launch. https://www.yoinn.cl
- Yoinn Wallet — multi-tenant SaaS issuing live Apple Wallet & Google Wallet passes with MercadoPago (Next.js 15 + NestJS + Prisma + PostgreSQL). https://github.com/estebanampuero/yoinn_wallet
- LockedInWork — AI automation studio building n8n + LLM pipelines for B2B clients. https://www.lockedinwork.com

## What Miguel is looking for
Full-time roles or contracts at MedTech / HealthTech companies and scaleups in
Germany and the EU — as a solutions engineer, full-stack engineer, founding
engineer or clinical-software builder. Visa sponsorship welcome. Remote, hybrid
or on-site.
